fallback_actions.disabled_reason: Only compare/review or alternate-target export is admitted.
fallback_actions.summary: Direct save is blocked on this surface.
Inspect the provider, metadata, and identity reasons ordinary save is blocked.
Export or copy the visible content to a new target without claiming in-place authority.
Compare the visible overlay with the current authoritative source before any export or follow-up action.

notes: Overlay documents remain provider truth layers, not local-source authority.
scenario: A provider-backed infrastructure overlay blocks ordinary save, keeps logical-target ambiguity visible, and routes the user through compare-first review or alternate-target export only.
